nasb.text: The Lord will smite you with consumption and with fever and with inflammation and with fiery heat and with the sword and with blight and with mildew, and they will pursue you until you perish.

esv.text: The Lord will strike you with wasting disease and with fever, inflammation and fiery heat, and with drought and with blight and with mildew. They shall pursue you until you perish.

cnv.text: 耶和華必用癆病、熱病、炎症、瘧疾、乾旱、旱風和霉爛打擊你；它們必追趕你，直到你滅亡。

ccb.text: “祂要使你们遭受痨病、热症、疟疾、炙热、刀剑、干旱和霉烂之灾，直到你们灭亡。
